responses: Hello there! Welcome to Moonage Files. What can I help you with today?

Our prices vary by design.
 - Php 100 for simple designs
 - Php 150+ for more complicated works.
 The price range will be based on the discretion of the creator
Completion fo your orders will vary by the amount of orders that we are currently processing. However, expect it to be completed in around 3-5 days

patterns: how would i get my order
responses: You can get your order via meet-up (only available for Gen. T. De Leon, Valenzuela City orders). We can also ship your order, but the customer shall shoulder the shipping fee
